name: io.github.surendranb/google-analytics-mcp
description: GA4 MCP server for AI agents: schema discovery, server-side aggregation, analysis-ready defaults.

environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to your Google Cloud service account JSON key with GA4 property access.

environmentVariables.name: GA4_PROPERTY_ID
environmentVariables.description: Numeric GA4 Property ID to query, for example 123456789.
